metadata.title: Build a governed SRX ACE workflow for a healthcare content system in South Asia, handling schema_blur chaos input with explicit validation gates.

mission.primary_objective: Build a governed SRX ACE workflow for a healthcare content system in South Asia, handling schema_blur chaos input with explicit validation gates.
mission.success_definition: Workflow processes a schema_blur input and produces a valid SR8-compilable output with Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, and Output Contract.; All validation gates are triggered and logged.; Output contract includes fields: artifact_type, depth_tier, runtime_target, should_block, blocked_reason, compiled_intent.; No hallucinated or fabricated data; all fields derived from input or explicitly marked as unresolved.

in_scope.item: The workflow must ingest messy, ambiguous content requests (missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, unclear acceptance criteria) and produce a validated, structured artifact suitable for SR8 compilation.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: Workflow processes a schema_blur input and produces a valid SR8-compilable output with Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, and Output Contract.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 2
gate.pass_condition: All validation gates are triggered and logged.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 3
gate.pass_condition: Output contract includes fields: artifact_type, depth_tier, runtime_target, should_block, blocked_reason, compiled_intent.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 4
gate.pass_condition: No hallucinated or fabricated data; all fields derived from input or explicitly marked as unresolved.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.workflow_objective: Build a governed SRX ACE workflow for a healthcare content system in South Asia, handling schema_blur chaos input with explicit validation gates.

workflow_phases.item: The workflow must ingest messy, ambiguous content requests (missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, unclear acceptance criteria) and produce a validated, structured artifact suitable for SR8 compilation.

validation_gates.item: Workflow processes a schema_blur input and produces a valid SR8-compilable output with Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, and Output Contract.
All validation gates are triggered and logged.
Output contract includes fields: artifact_type, depth_tier, runtime_target, should_block, blocked_reason, compiled_intent.
No hallucinated or fabricated data; all fields derived from input or explicitly marked as unresolved.

receipt_contract.item: compiled_intent: Objective: string; Scope: string; Constraints: string; Success Criteria: string; Output Contract: object

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: No blocked state recorded by SR8 at render time.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
